title: Castile washing-up liquid
subtitle: A gentle plant-based hand dish wash from liquid castile soap, washing soda, and essential oil
excerpt: This is not a commercial foaming washing-up liquid. It is a plant-based dish wash suitable for hand washing up. It does not foam as aggressively as detergent-based liquids, and salt is used as a natural thickener. It is not suitable for a dishwasher.
sourceNotes: Castile soap dish wash formulation from Wellness Mama and similar natural cleaning references.

recipe.batchNotes: Make in larger batches and decant into multiple bottles.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 6 months. The castile soap base is stable. Discard if the liquid separates permanently or develops an off smell.

glossaryTerms.definition: A plant-oil-based liquid soap, traditionally made from olive oil and potassium hydroxide. It is a gentle, biodegradable cleanser that works as the base for many natural cleaning products.

Sodium carbonate (Na2CO3). A natural mineral salt that boosts cleaning power by softening water and increasing alkalinity. More powerful than bicarbonate of soda. Used at low concentrations in dish wash formulas.

Sodium chloride (table salt) thickens soap-based liquids by interacting with the surfactant molecules. Adding salt in small quantities to a diluted castile soap base can increase viscosity without changing its cleaning properties.

content.text: to boost cutting power through grease, and salt as a natural

. The result is a thicker, pourable liquid. Lemon or tea tree essential oil adds fragrance and a degree of antibacterial action. Expect less foam than a commercial product; the cleaning action is still effective. Not suitable for a dishwasher. Shelf life is 6 months.

items.prepNote: 1% of formula; dissolved in the warm water before adding soap
3% of formula; dissolved in water before adding soap

content.text: Dissolve the washing soda and salt in the warm water and stir until clear. Allow to cool to room temperature. Add the castile soap slowly and stir gently; avoid vigorous mixing which creates foam. Add the essential oil and stir again. Pour into the pump bottle.

Store at room temperature. Shelf life is 6 months. If the liquid becomes too thick, add a small amount of warm water and shake gently. Do not use in a dishwasher. Discard if the product develops an off smell.
